parents.subject: LU-11011 osc: add preferred checksum type support

commit.subject: LU-12269 tests: test RHEL 8.0
commit.message:
LU-12269 tests: test RHEL 8.0

This is for test only.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=zfs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes \
clientdistro=el8 serverdistro=el8 \
testlist=sanity

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=zfs \
envdefinitions=SLOW=yes,ENABLE_QUOTA=yes \
clientdistro=el8 serverdistro=el8 \
testgroup=full

Change-Id: Ib37c647ebaba6678150d6d51e57be885e3b66174
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
